negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing startup SynchronousScheduler initialization and initialization-failure abort. Nodebuilder add-ons parse SCHEDULER_ADDRESS with expect and default fallback, but no local SynchronousScheduler startup path was found.
related_but_insufficient_code: RitualAddOns::default parses SCHEDULER_ADDRESS and panics on invalid address format.
Port get_scheduler_address parses env with fallback, but does not initialize SynchronousScheduler.

rationale: The nodebuilder candidates form a coherent startup invariant but are kept at medium confidence because the packet does not show whether nodebuilder is still the deployed startup path.
statement: Node startup paths that configure the scheduler parse SCHEDULER_ADDRESS as an Alloy address when set, use the built-in default when unset, initialize SynchronousScheduler before launching the node, and abort startup on invalid addresses or initialization failure.
suggested_falsification_tests: Start node with invalid SCHEDULER_ADDRESS and assert startup aborts before launch.
Assert SynchronousScheduler is initialized before node launch.
summary: Address parsing exists, but SynchronousScheduler startup initialization is absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Startup integration test for scheduler address parsing and scheduler initialization.
title: Scheduler address initialization is parsed and fail-fast
